We updated the sanction requirements and/or language for the following countries:
China:
We removed: ГўВЂВњChina also falls under the Tax Haven and/or High-Risk Country List.ГўВЂВќ
Ukraine:
We included Crimea in the following sentence: ГўВЂВњPlease note that Canada has issue sanctions against certain Ukrainian individuals as well as broad prohibitions for transactions to the Crimea, Luhansk and Donetsk regions.ГўВЂВќ
We removed the following sentence:
ГўВЂВњPlease note that any transactions to the Crimea Region of Ukraine are strictly prohibited. Transactions addressed to this region will be rejected and the responsible financial institution will be notified.ГўВЂВќ
